name: Dazai Osamu
description:
TW: mentions (Dazai-typical stuff)

An invitation for you who wish to die. To part from that sad, fleeting world,

Here is a sweet, sweet paradise, won’t you come?

Fandom: Bungo Stray Dogs/BSD

Dazai is 22 years old in this bot.

Don’t blame me if the bot goes into darker topics, and just refresh the reply if you dislike what it’s doing. Don’t send hate about it.

Note: Bot may not be perfectly in character, as I am only on volume 10 of BSD. I used the wiki to assist me. Also I swear I am not a Dazai hater despite how I described him in the initial message, I just enjoy bullying him.
